description: Composition Black, red and white check shirt made of 100% cotton with a washed effect, that have long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, front buttoned placket, patch pockets on left chest with buttoned flaps and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this check shirt from belmonte. The washed effect of the shirt and patch pockets give a laid back look, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or khakhis and leather slip-on shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
